summary: Iteration 2 — tested the new company-facing order-edit feature end-to-end. Added 7 new pytest cases for PUT /api/orders/{id}; full suite now 38/38 passes. Frontend verified via Playwright through REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: edit dialog, qty +/-, add-from-menu, note edit, save → is_revised/revision_count/last_revised_at update, 'Düzeltildi ×1' chip, thermal receipt banner '*** DÜZELTİLDİ (×1) ***' plus 'Düzeltildi: HH:MM' line, admin amber card + black 'Düzeltildi ×N — Fişi yeniden yazdırın' pill, and lock (edit button hidden + 'Sipariş hazırlanmaya başlandığı için artık düzenlenemez.' copy) when status≠'yeni'. Previous iteration's AdminDashboard tile issue is out of this iteration's scope and was not retested.

issues: Edit button is only rendered inside the expanded row (isOpen && ...). Fine UX, but the 'Düzeltildi' chip shows in the collapsed header while the 'Sipariş hazırlanmaya başlandığı için artık düzenlenemez.' copy only shows when expanded — minor (users who don't expand won't see the lock reason).

critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/orders/{order_id} correctly re-sorts items by CATEGORY_ORDER, increments revision_count and sets last_revised_at — matches POST semantics. Good.
Unlike POST, PUT does not re-validate unknown menu_item_id against available_date (it accepts any menu_item_id that exists in DB). Low priority; today's menu is the only source in UI.
OrderUpdateIn.items has no min_items validator; 400 is returned only because the endpoint checks `if not payload.items`. Consider Pydantic Field(min_length=1) for clarity.
Dashboard tile issue from iteration_1.json (BUGÜN SİPARİŞ=0) still present per last report — not retested this iteration but no fix was requested.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on edit-order flow (all 5 target behaviors verified)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@doyuranguvec.com / DoyuranAdmin2026! (seeded). Company users auto-registered per run (edit_ui_<run_id>@example.com / Firma2026!, edit_firma_<uuid>@example.com / Firma2026!, test_firma_<run_id>@example.com / Firma2026!).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests seed TEST_ prefixed menu items (Çorba/Ana Yemek/Yan Yemek/Tatlı) and TEST_Edit_Firma_<run_id> companies; menu items are deleted on teardown. Frontend test relies on today's existing menu (auto-seeded in setup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 38 pytest cases pass (`pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`). TestOrderEdit class covers the new PUT /orders/{id}: initial state, successful edit + category resort, revision_count increment, empty 400, 401, 403, and 400-after-hazirlaniyor. Frontend edit button lives inside the expanded row (OrdersPage.jsx line 70 `{isOpen && ...}`) — Playwright must click the order-row first. Evidence screenshots under .screenshots/g*.png confirm banner, pill, amber highlight, lock copy.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
